title: Nsobi Ya Kaapa
description: Omulenzi mu lugero luno teyasobola kumala omuwaka we olwa kaapa emu. Kale kiyulikika nga ekitaliyo naye? Naye musomeko olabe ekya mutukako ojya kulaba engeri ekintu ekimu wekitusa kukirara nekiraramr.

pages.text:
lyaki tewakoze omuwaka wo?
Yabadde kapa eyanemeseza.

Ssinga kapa teyalalidde kumuti,
sandi funye ddala kuwalampa.
Ssinga safunye ddala kulilinya, sandye tazze kuliteleza, sandi zukusiza bbebi.

Singa sazukusiza bbebi,maama wange teyandi ze mu fumbiro
singa maama wange teyazze mufubiro, ekiima teyandi yingidemu.

Singa ekiima teya yiigila munda, teyandi lidde meere yoona
singa teyalya meere yoona, taata wange teyandi guze enkoko ku dduka
Singa taata wange yalitaguzze enkoko ku dduka, ebwa teyandi mu goberedde ewaka.
Singa ebwa teyamu goberedde, teyandi lidde omuwaka wange.

This story has been translated as part of
the curriculum for the 
Creative Writing Course
of
Uganda Christian University
